content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad market constructive: Nifty +0.27%, Bank Nifty +0.84%, Pharma leading +1.59%, VIX cooling to 17.48 (-2.4%). Earnings season delivering positive surprises across portfolio names (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK, M&M, COFORGE, NAVINFLUOR, SOBHA, ABCAPITAL all beat). Book is well-positioned with multiple unrealized winners; focus this tick is trailing SLs on winners and managing pending HFCL order, not new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +6.4%, CMP 1053. Current SL 1035 is already at breakeven+ (entry 984). Trail-gap discipline: SL 1035 is 1.7% below CMP 1053 — appropriate trailing distance, do not tighten further. Q4 beat thesis intact (PAT +19%, GNPA <1%). HOLD effectively — emitting MODIFY only to confirm levels; if engine treats as no-op, that's fine."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold hedge, -1.1% within normal noise. SL 119 = -4.9% gives chop room. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.8%, CMP 1729. SL already at 1715 (breakeven+15). Day fading from 1750 high to 1729 — at-ATH stock with promoter 2% stake-sale overhang. SL 1715 is 0.8% below CMP — slightly tight per trail-gap rule but acceptable given ATH valuation risk. Keeping levels as-is; this is a no-op pre-confirmation."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.7%, CMP 207.68 vs SL 206. Bank participating (sector +0.97%, PSU +1.33%). Q4 beat + NIM expansion guidance intact. SL 206 = 0.8% below CMP — tight but legal. Hold; no MODIFY (would be no-op or tightening below 1% gap)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4560.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +2.0%, CMP 4656.50, +2.13% today on new CMD catalyst + heavy volumes. Stored SL 4575 = entry. Per trailing mandate (b): with +2% gain SL should be at least breakeven (already there). Trail-gap: 4575 is 1.75% below CMP 4656 — already adequate. NEW SL 4560 is actually LOOSER than 4575 — system will reject. Withdrawing tightening; this MODIFY should be HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 35,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -2.7%, CMP 1436.80, SL 1420 only 1.2% away. Q4 was actually GOOD (PAT +124% YoY, pre-sales +30%) yet stock faded from 1577 intraday high to 1436 — classic 'bullish news, bearish price' rejection signal. Realty sector weak (Nifty Realty struggling, peers DLF/Godrej/Prestige down). Better to exit at -2.7% than risk SL trigger at -4%. Capital redeployable elsewhere."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6950.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.8,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +2.2%, CMP 7052, SL already at 6950 (breakeven+50). Trail-gap: 6950 is 1.45% below CMP — adequate. Q4 stellar (PAT +124%, EBITDA margin 34.2%), pledge fully released, Geojit Rs 8500 target. Keep target at 7400 for now, trail higher when +4%. No-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.7%, CMP 834 vs entry 838. Sector +9% rally yesterday, Jefferies Buy, order book strong. SL 820 = 1.7% below CMP, appropriate. Today opened 850 then faded to 834 — profit-booking after yesterday's spike, thesis intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat (-0.1%), CMP 369.30 at 52-week high. Q4 beat (+31% PAT), AUM +16%, NBFC disbursements +28%. SL 358 = 3.1% below CMP, room to develop. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.7%, CMP 824.85, just broke 52w high. Tighten SL from 805 to 815 (1.2% below CMP, satisfies trail-gap) to lock in near-breakeven on this defensive FMCG name where margin compression is the bear case. Q4 had headline beat but EBITDA margin contracted 115bps; want to give the breakout some room but cap downside."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.7%, CMP 3278 vs entry 3290. Q4 record results (PAT +42%, FY26 PAT +35%), Rs 33/share dividend. Day high 3315 faded to 3278 — normal post-results profit-taking. SL 3245 = 1% below CMP, acceptable. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.8%, CMP 1267.90, gapped +10% today on Q4 beat (revenue +30%, PAT +91% FY26). SL 1215 = 4.2% below CMP — wide given volatility but appropriate post-gap day. Will trail aggressively if it consolidates above 1280 in next session. Hold today."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+; trail-gap 1.7% below CMP is appropriate. Will tighten further if move extends to 1070+."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; -1.1% within tolerance."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+15; ATH stock, no further tightening warranted (gap ~0.8%)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Slight loss, sector participating, thesis intact. SL already tight at -1.7% below entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry/breakeven, trail-gap 1.75%. Wait for stronger move before tightening further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Bullish-news/bearish-price rejection at intraday high 1577 → 1436. Realty sector weak. Better to exit at -2.7% than SL-trigger at -4%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 6950.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven+. Trail-gap 1.45% adequate. Consider trail to 6900*0.98=6762... actually 6950 already locked-in profit; hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Yesterday's +9% rally cooling; SL 820 protective. Thesis (Jefferies Buy, order book) intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high, Q4 beat strong. SL 358 gives 3% room — appropriate for breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 815.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten from 805 to 815 (1.2% below CMP) given 52w-high breakout with margin-compression undertone. Locks in near-breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "M&M",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Post-results consolidation; SL 3245 = 1% below CMP, will trail when move resumes."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Gap day + post-earnings; let it consolidate before trailing. SL 1215 = 4.2% below CMP appropriate for vol."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "PNB (Q4 +14%, dividend) and SRF (Q4 beat + Rs 2300 Cr capex) are constructive setups but book is already 65% deployed and many post-earnings names have already gapped. AUROPHARMA at 52w high after +7% — chase risk too high. CAMS gapped +10% — wait for consolidation. HFCL pending BUY at 133.50 still OPEN (placed 383min ago at limit BELOW current quote zone presumably) — leaving in place; will reassess if not filled by 14:00.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 65% deployed across 12 names — diversified and earnings-tailwind-rich. Risk discipline today is to trail winners and exit decaying SOBHA position rather than add new exposure. After SOBHA exit, ~Rs 50K capital freed; will deploy selectively if market closes strong. Daily P&L +0.37% solid. No new entries this tick — quality of book > quantity of names. Watching HFCL pending order; if unfilled by EOD will reassess."
}
